name: Melting Grill
address: 2051 Farm to Market 1626, Manchaca, TX 78652, USA
review_1_text: Had the burger one day and the tacos the next. The food is very filling and flavorful. I got the Grill Thrill burger and the Tikka Taco. The burger comes with fries. If your getting the tacos get 3 and you will be full.
review_2_text:
Fellow foodies….

I recently stopped into this gas station to use the restroom on my way back from Kyle. If you are someone who loves tacos or just food with crazy intense curltual flavors l, then you HAVE to try this place. Being on the road a ton I have stopped at many places to grab tacos whether that be gas stations or restaurants, but Melting Grill’s tacos are in a league of their own. They offer much more than just tacos as you can see from the menu I’ve attach. The tacos are price perfectly as well….i have paid way more for lesser tasting tacos elsewhere. The owner, Altaf Maaneshia, is the coolest dude as well and makes it easy to want to help support a local business owner like Altaf. He’s passionate about making great tasting so if you call yourself a taco lover then you got to give Melting Grill a try.

I can’t wait to try one of their burgers next time!

Keep up the great work, Altaf!
review_3_text:
This place is a hidden gem just like the store it's located in (Beer Geek).

Not only can you have some amazing Pakistani Mexican fusion food with fresh ingredients and an incredibly inviting and passionate staff you can also have a draft beer while you wait!

So far I have had the Texas toast breakfast sandwich, Garlic mayo fries and the Un Tikka qusadillas. All of which have been incredibly tasty.

Highly recommend anyone come by and check out The Melting Grill located in Beer Geek!
review_4_text: I had the Bully bowl and my boyfriend got one of the burgers. Very flavorful and filling with very friendly service as well! A must go!
review_5_text: This place is like a little gold mine. Knowing about this place is like knowing manchaca's best kept secret! My husband has always come home raving about how good their food is so I decided I must try it out for myself. He finally took me the other day and I literally had THE BEST burger I've ever had. I ordered the shoorama burger. That thing had so much flavor! I got a side of fries with their garlic mayo and mixed in the green sauce! Amazing Amazing Amazing! The staff is super friendly and environment was very clean. I will definitely be back!
editorial_summary: Tucked inside a gas station, this unassuming eatery serves Mexican dishes such as tacos and burritos.
